title: How Astronomers Captured the Andromeda Galaxy

scenes.text: Astronomers used advanced tech to capture stunning views of Andromeda.
They utilized extensive exposures and modern cameras for high-quality images.
Andromeda is on a collision course with the Milky Way.
What does this mean for our own galaxy?
scenes.label: COLLISION WITH MILKY WAY

scenes.text: Follow if curiosity runs your brain.

description: Astronomers captured stunning views of the Andromeda Galaxy using modern technology! Discover its collision course with the Milky Way. Follow for more incredible astronomy facts!
